commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs')
for name in sorted(base.glob('mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge*.log')):
    lines = name.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
    print('=== ' + name.name + ' lines=' + str(len(lines)) + ' ===')
    for ln in lines[-20:]:
        print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
    print('')
PY

sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 jlist' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log('status='+p?.pm2_env?.status);console.log('uptime_sec='+Math.floor((Date.now()-p?.pm2_env?.pm_uptime)/1000));console.log('out='+p?.pm2_env?.pm_out_log_path);console.log('err='+p?.pm2_env?.pm_err_log_path);});"
